violations.text: The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Facility informed to clean and monitor areas for activity. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the storage shelves (walk-in cooler) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Cleaning has been scheduled. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The floors in the dry storage and "twist and fill" chemical dispenser areas have an accumulation of rodent droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

(Cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (dish cart ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The floors, floor drains(dishwashing area)in storage rooms and utility areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (loading dock ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 10 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service during inspection. PIC will sanitize via 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Knife holders, -Utensil bins, -Food cart. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The floors (under shelves) and floor drains throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The floors in back food storage areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

1 dr refrigerator located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature observed at 44DF.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food products in unit until repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

The following physical facilities observed with debris: 1.floors throughout facility and floor drain in warewashing have an accumulation of soil, food residue, and/or other debris. 2.ceiling in rear food storage area observed with black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024

The following physical facilities observed with debris: 1.floors throughout facility and floor drain in warewashing have an accumulation of soil, food residue, and/or other debris. 2.hood/ventilation units observed with dust. 3.ceiling in rear food storage area observed with black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
